name: mmd-desktop-mascot
description: Windows desktop mascot app scaffold built with Electron, React, Vite, TypeScript, and Three.js.

scripts.dev: npm run build:main && concurrently -k -n renderer,electron -c blue,green "vite src/renderer --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 --strictPort" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && npm run build:main && vite build src/renderer --base ./ --outDir ../../dist/renderer --emptyOutDir
